key_points.our_fit_analysis: P1 sweet-spot — EX onboarding program management is Jamie's strongest match. Real overlap: onboarding redesign (Vestas across 3 global locations; InGenius -75% time, 70+ staff), program management (20+ programs, 10+ vendors), measure-impact-not-participation (NextGen 2,000+ analysis -> manager-effectiveness driver -> C-suite), cross-functional partnership, AI-as-daily-collaborator. GAP disclosed in cover: JD wants an experienced PM who's 'led global onboarding end to end' at Notion's scale ($195-210K band, senior); Jamie's onboarding work was as enablement manager / HRBP partner — real but more junior in scope. Cover names this growth edge honestly; resume does NOT claim she owned a global program end-to-end.
key_points.source_note: no full JD captured; key points composed from our record fields (jd_source=none).
